title: trias obesa
intro: Trias obesa, also known as the "fat-spleen," is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Trias obesa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Trias obesa is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as a decoction, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
